published_title: 12: Greg Hill shared -Pete Loncarevich Kicks My Tire in 1985 NBL Grands- 2 months later-at ABA Grand
archival_display_title: Pete Loncarevich, the 1985 Grands, and Greg Hill’s Response
summary: Greg Hill recalls Pete Loncarevich kicking his tire during a semifinal at the 1985 NBL Grands and says he responded approximately two months later at the ABA Grands by running Loncarevich off the track.
claim_status: attributed firsthand competition recollection; not independently adjudicated
transcript_status: supplied partial transcript excerpt; ending incomplete
